title: Lunar.dev Discovered Endpoint
description: Represents an API endpoint discovered by the Lunar Gateway through observed traffic, including request metrics such as count, latency, and status code distributions.

method.description: HTTP method observed for this endpoint.

url.description: The URL pattern of the discovered endpoint.

status_codes.description: Distribution of HTTP status codes observed for this endpoint.

count.description: Total number of requests observed for this endpoint.

average_latency_ms.description: Average latency in milliseconds for requests to this endpoint.
